items.title: Lectric 72-hour Lightning Deals strike the XP4 750 and XPress 750 e-bikes for up to $439 in FREE gear at $1,299, more
items.summary:
It’s rare for lightning to strike twice, unless it’s coming from Lectric, which has just launched a new 72-hour Lightning Deal Sale on two particular e-bikes (plus, 30% off extra batteries) that mimics what we saw from over the weekend. Now, through the rest of April, you’ll get bolstered savings on two particular models, the first being the newer XP4 750 Folding Utility e-bike with $394 in FREE gear at $1,299 shipped, while the XPress 750 High-Step Commuter e-bike is getting $439 in FREE gear at $1,299 shipped. These two packages would run you $1,693 and $1,738, respectively, without the savings on the bundles themselves, which contain all you could need for your regular travels around town and beyond. The main question here is just what you’re looking for in your new ride? You can head below to learn about these two e-bikes, or browse the full lineup of deals on Lectric’s main sale page here.

Baseus Picogo 0.3-inch 5,000mAh MagSafe power bank

Buy for $14 (Reg. $30)

Enter promo code QCBBW9VM for $16 off

What we love

This is one of the slimmest 5,000mAh MagSafe power banks I’ve used, and that alone has earned it a permanent spot in my everyday carry. It may not be the fastest one out there supporting rapid charging, but its thin, lightweight design makes it incredibly comfortable to keep attached to your phone while using it via MagSafe.

items.title: EcoFlow 48-hour flash sale returns 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Plus power station to $1,399 low, more from $1,099
items.summary:
As part of the extended Earth Day Mega Sale, EcoFlow has launched a 48-hour flash sale period with up to 61% savings on two power station units, as well as some expansion battery and home backup bundles. One notable return during this window is the EcoFlow DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Portable Power Station at $1,399 shipped, beating out its Amazon pricing by $50. Though it has occasionally spiked back to its $2,899 full price, we’ve mostly seen this model staying at $1,449 since February, which happens to be the second-best price we have spotted in its history. Now, though, during these 48 hours, you’ll be getting $50 additional savings (and $1,500 total savings) that drops things back to the all-time lowest price we have tracked since it last appeared in January. Head below to learn more and browse the three other flash offers while they’re still around.

It hadn’t seen many meaningful discounts before now, previously dipping only to around the $42 mark. Today’s offer, however, delivers a solid 37% price cut, knocking $17 off its usual going rate. items.title: Corsair’s ultra-thin K100 AIR wireless RGB low-profile mechanical gaming keyboard hits new all-time low at $123 (58% off)
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Corsair’s K100 AIR wireless RGB mechanical keyboard in black down to $122.99 shipped. This is originally a $280 keyboard that’s been around for a while now as one of the more reliable low-profile models in Corsair’s lineup. It has seen several price corrections and has more recently been fetching close to $290. Today’s deal takes $167 off its usual going rate to deliver a whopping 58% discount. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this keyboard to date, making this a great time to snag one if you were eyeing a new low-profile mechanical keyboard for your battlestation. Best Buy currently has it listed for a touch higher at $129.99 shipped, which still works out to about a 55% markdown. Head below for more details.

This is one of the newer entries in the brand’s Odyssey lineup, which debuted late last year with a $550 price tag.
